coach_notes: The most critical gaps are graphic design and Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator), as these are core technical skills frequently required for roles involving visual communication, signage, or digital content in protective-service settings like security or facility management. Without them, you cannot create or edit visual materials for access control, emergency signage, or training aids. Focus on completing a short online course in Photoshop and Illustrator basics to bridge this gap quickly.
